name: adobe-extensibility-mcp
description: A remote MCP server deployed on Adobe I/O Runtime that serves a curated library of Adobe developer skills — covering App Builder actions, frontend patterns, and Workfront APIs — to any MCP-compatible coding agent. It implements the Agent Skills progressive disclosure pattern to deliver institutional Adobe development knowledge on demand, without redeploying or re-prompting context into every agent session.

scripts.test:report: jest --json --outputFile=test-results/unit-results.json; node scripts/results-to-md.js test-results/unit-results.json test-results/unit-report.md 'Unit Tests'
scripts.test:e2e:report: jest test/e2e.test.js --testPathIgnorePatterns=node_modules --testTimeout=30000 --forceExit --no-coverage --json --outputFile=test-results/e2e-results.json && node scripts/results-to-md.js test-results/e2e-results.json test-results/e2e-report.md 'E2E Tests'
scripts.test:all:report: npm run test:report && npm run test:e2e:report
scripts.deploy: npm run build && aio app deploy

author: David Benge <your.email@example.com>
